stemHtml: Which statement concerning oxygen on board of passenger transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: Portable oxygen bottles are primarily intended for use in case the chemical oxygen generators fail.
options.b: Since lavatories are not fitted with an oxygen system, they should be evacuated quickly in case of decompression.
options.c: Chemical oxygen generators are provided with a heat shield.
options.d: A chemical oxygen generator is able to provide oxygen for at least one hour.
